li.label: pleasant warmth
li.description: I feel a pleasant warmth spreading through my body. This is quite nice.

li.label: giggly
li.description: I can't stop giggling! Everything seems so funny right now.

li.label: joyfully tipsy
li.description: I feel tipsy and joyful! Everything seems more fun!

li.label: euphoric
li.description: I'm euphoric and having the time of my life! This is amazing!

li.label: flesh colony presence
li.description: The colony's beasts move through the shared flesh. Their presence is small, but the rhythm is already comforting.

li.label: many fleshbeasts nearby
li.description: The colony has grown enough bodies to feel like a living crowd around me. I am not alone inside the flesh.

li.label: surrounded by the flesh swarm
li.description: The colony is dense with living beasts. Their weight presses through the shared mind and steadies my thoughts.

li.label: the flesh is everywhere
li.description: The colony is vast, warm, and close. Every beast is another pulse in the same body, and I rest inside it.

li.label: flesh tentacle accepted
li.description: The tentacle is no longer an alien growth, but another limb of the colony's shared flesh.

li.label: ate strange biomass
li.description: I ate a warm mass of unfamiliar living tissue. It was nourishing, but I would rather not know what was moving inside it.
